6 #include "franky/motion/joint_impedance_base.hpp"
7 #include "franky/wait_free_triple_buffer.hpp"
8 
9 namespace franky {
10 
18 using JointReferenceHandle = WaitFreeTripleBuffer<std::optional<JointReference>>;
19 
26 class JointImpedanceTrackingMotion : public JointImpedanceBase {
27  public:
28  using Params = JointImpedanceParams;
29  using ReferenceCallback =
30  std::function<JointReference(const RobotState &, franka::Duration, franka::Duration, franka::Duration)>;
31 
32  explicit JointImpedanceTrackingMotion(const Params &params = Params{}, double gains_time_constant = 0.1);
33  explicit JointImpedanceTrackingMotion(
34  ReferenceCallback reference_callback, const Params &params = Params{}, double gains_time_constant = 0.1);
35 
36  void setReference(const JointReference &reference) {
37  reference.validate();
38  reference_handle_.set(reference);
39  }
40  [[nodiscard]] std::optional<JointReference> getReference() const { return reference_handle_.getLastWritten(); }
41 
42  protected:
43  void initImpl(const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<franka::Torques> &previous_command) override;
44  franka::Torques nextCommandImpl(
45  const RobotState &robot_state, franka::Duration time_step, franka::Duration rel_time, franka::Duration abs_time,
46  const std::optional<franka::Torques> &previous_command) override;
47 
48  private:
49  JointReferenceHandle reference_handle_{std::nullopt};
50  ReferenceCallback reference_callback_;
51 };
52 
53 } // namespace franky
